title: Mideast Fighting: Live Updates: New Wave of Airstrikes Batters Tehran
summary_full: The Israeli military said Saturday that it had launched more strikes on Iran’s capital. Some hit near the Mehrabad Airport. Footage shared on state media showed explosions and columns of smoke.
